title: KaleidoscopeTFCTavern
description: This mod is compatible with Kaleidoscope Tavern and TerraFirmaCraft: The Next Generation.
body:
This mod is compatible with Kaleidoscope Tavern and TerraFirmaCraft: The Next Generation.

Achieved compatibility with grapes, grape crops, and the spawning of wild grapevines. Also ensured compatibility with TFC's original wine and KT's new wine recipes, as well as KT's recipes.
